meta.description: Portfolio of Florencia Frumento: how I design user experiences where content guides, simplifies, and connects.
meta.title: Florencia Frumento | Content Designer and UX Writer | My portfolio

hero.title: Florencia Frumento
hero.claim: I design user experiences where content guides, simplifies, and connects.

intro.title: Content with a product mindset
intro.p1: My background in Literature and my interest in technology led me to work at the intersection of language, experience, and business.
intro.p2: I design user experiences through content with a product mindset, where every word helps structure information, guide decisions, and improve usability.

featured.title: Case studies
featured.description: A selection of projects where content played an active role in product experience, conversion, and journey clarity.

experience.title: Professional path
experience.description: A journey across content, product, digital projects, and communities, with a focus on clarity, strategy, and growth.
itemsHtml:
2021 — 2026

Tiendanube

Content Strategist

I designed content strategies and digital experiences for Tiendanube and Tiendanube Evolución. I worked across acquisition journeys, landing pages, in-app experiences, SEO, and CRO with a focus on clarity, business goals, and UX.

I specialized in SEO, combining strategy, production, and content optimization for traffic and conversion. I also worked on landing page creation, copywriting, A/B testing, and audiovisual projects, including the relaunch of the YouTube channel.

What I took away: a systemic view of content and how business, product, UX, and communication work together to drive growth.

2017 — 2021

Organization of Ibero-American States

Technical project manager

I coordinated projects in the Cooperation and Innovation area related to education and culture. I organized in-person and virtual events, managed budgets, and developed results reports for different stakeholders.

What I took away: I learned how to manage complex projects, coordinate across teams, and communicate clearly in institutional environments.

2017 — 2021

Corear Video Game Music Orchestra

Community Manager

I led the orchestra's content and social media strategy through copywriting, graphic piece design, and content scheduling and publishing.

My goals were to build community, amplify reach, and strengthen the project's positioning across multiple platforms.

What I took away: I learned how to connect narrative, audience, and brand to create active and engaged communities.

approach.title: Content that guides decisions
approach.description: I design content by understanding the full context: the person's need, the business goal, and the product logic.
itemsHtml:
Clarity

Structuring information so each message is easy to understand and act on.

Context

Writing according to the point in the flow, the person's need, and the product goal.

Product judgment

Thinking of content as part of the experience, not as a final layer of text.

Data

Using qualitative and quantitative signals to decide, refine, and learn.

AI

Exploring artificial intelligence tools to research, prototype, and iterate digital products.

contact.title: Let's design better experiences
contact.description: I'm looking to join teams where content, product, and experience work together.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell me a bit about yourself, the role, or the opportunity.
